text.title: Semantic Tokens and Modes Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to ship a three-layer DTCG token configuration with full mode coverage and a Style Dictionary pipeline.

step.name: model-three-layers
step.input: Existing token files / Figma Variables collection.
step.action: Declare reference (palette + scale), system (semantic intent), component (component-scope). Move any raw hex out of component into reference; introduce semantic aliases.
step.output: Three-layer JSON tree in DTCG format.
step.decision-gate: If component-layer tokens still reference reference layer, reject and re-route through system layer.

step.name: declare-modes
step.action: List required modes in `modes` array. For each semantic token, populate `values_by_mode` for every required mode using reference aliases.
step.decision-gate: Run `templates/check-modes.mjs`. If any mode value missing, fail.

step.name: wire-pipeline
step.input: Mode-complete token tree + platform list (css / swift / compose).
step.action: Generate `style-dictionary.config.cjs` with per-platform transformGroups. Emit tokens.css with `[data-theme="..."]` blocks per mode; tokens.swift with `Color.Theme` struct; tokens.compose.kt with ThemeTokens object.

step.name: lint-component-code
step.action: Add ESLint / Stylelint rules: reject raw hex in components, reject direct reference-token usage. Add codemod that rewrites prior raw values to semantic aliases on PR.
step.decision-gate: If lint fails on existing code, run codemod before merging migration PR.

step.name: visual-regression-per-mode
step.input: Chromatic / Percy / Loki configured for storybook.
step.action: Configure visual-regression to capture every story in every mode. Block merge on any unexplained diff.
step.output: Visual-regression baseline established; mode-swap regressions caught at CI.
